HomePage.title: PulseFit — Modern Gym & Fitness
HomePage.description: Join PulseFit, a modern fitness experience with expert coaches, flexible memberships, smart programs, and real progress tracking.

hero.headline: Train stronger. Move better. Become unstoppable
hero.subheadline: Join a modern fitness experience built around expert coaching, smart programs, and real progress you can measure.
hero.trustLine: Personal coaching · Flexible memberships · Beginner friendly

strength.title: Strength Training
strength.desc: Build a solid foundation with progressive overload and proper technique.

fatLoss.title: Fat Loss & Conditioning
fatLoss.desc: High-intensity metabolic conditioning to burn fat and improve heart health.

hiit.title: HIIT & Cardio
hiit.desc: Fast-paced workouts designed to boost your endurance and metabolism.

mobility.title: Mobility & Recovery
mobility.desc: Improve your range of motion and recover faster with guided sessions.

final.heading: Ready to transform your life?
final.subheading: Join hundreds of members achieving real results every day. No excuses, just progress.

trial.heading: Book your free trial session.
trial.description: Meet a coach, test the facilities, and get a simple starting plan based on your goal. No pressure. Just a first step.

success.title: You're all set!
success.description: We'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm your session.

q1.q: Do I need a membership for a trial?
q1.a: No, the trial session is completely free and requires no commitment or credit card upfront.

q2.q: What should I bring to my first session?
q2.a: Bring comfortable workout clothes, indoor training shoes, a water bottle, and a towel. We provide everything else.

q3.a: Yes, we offer both monthly no-contract options and discounted annual plans. You can pause or cancel with 30 days notice.

q4.q: Do you have programs for total beginners?
q4.a: Absolutely. Most of our new members start from zero. Our coaches will guide you through the basics safely.

Transformations.heading: Real progress. Visible results.
Transformations.subtext: Every transformation starts with a single decision. Here's what commitment looks like.
Transformations.note: Results vary based on consistency, nutrition, and individual conditions.

alex.name: Alex M.
alex.quote: Lost 8kg in 12 weeks with consistent coaching and nutrition support. The plan actually fit my work schedule.

sarah.name: Sarah K.
sarah.quote: Went from struggling with empty barbells to deadlifting 80kg. The structured progression made all the difference.

james.name: James T.
james.quote: Chronic back stiffness gone. I move better at 35 than I did at 25. The recovery routines are game-changers.

WhyPulseFit.heading: Why members stay consistent with PulseFit.

smartPlans.title: Smart Training Plans
smartPlans.desc: AI-assisted periodization that adapts to your recovery, schedule, and progress in real-time.

coachLed.title: Coach-led Sessions
coachLed.desc: Every class is led by a certified professional who corrects form, pushes limits, and keeps you safe.

tracking.title: Progress Tracking
tracking.desc: Detailed metrics on strength, body composition, and workout consistency — visible in your dashboard.

flexible.title: Flexible Memberships
flexible.desc: No long-term contracts. Pause, upgrade, or switch plans anytime with zero penalty.

Trainers.heading: Train with coaches who know how to guide.

adam.name: Adam Carter
adam.bio: Former competitive powerlifter. Specializes in compound movements and progressive overload programming.

lina.name: Lina Mansour
lina.bio: Combines metabolic conditioning with functional movement. Known for transforming beginners into confident athletes.

omar.name: Omar Reed
omar.bio: Elite endurance background. Designs high-intensity protocols that maximize calorie burn and cardiovascular fitness.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Perfect for beginners testing the waters.

Testimonials.heading: Trusted by people who decided to start.

maya.quote: I finally found a gym where the coaches actually follow up and adjust the plan. After 3 months, I'm 10kg down and actually enjoy training.

daniel.quote: The programs are simple to follow, but the results feel serious. I've added 8kg of muscle in 6 months without living in the gym.

priya.quote: I started as a beginner and never felt judged. That made me stay. Now I'm deadlifting my bodyweight and feel stronger than ever.

Ticker.text: ENDURE · BEYOND · LIMITS · DISCIPLINE · SPEED · POWER ·

TrialCTA.heading: Book your free trial session.
TrialCTA.subtext: Meet a coach, test the facilities, and get a simple starting plan based on your goal. No pressure. Just a first step.

form.successMessage: We'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm your session.

items.a: Absolutely. Over 40% of our members started with little to no gym experience. Our coaches specialize in making beginners feel confident and progress safely.
Yes — that's exactly what our free trial session is for. Book a 45-minute session, meet a coach, tour the facility, and get a taste of the PulseFit experience with zero commitment.
Yes. All Plus and Elite memberships include nutrition guidance. Elite members get fully customized meal plans designed by certified sports nutritionists.
We offer designated women-only training hours several times per week. Check our class schedule for current timings.
Life happens. You can freeze your membership for up to 3 months per year at no extra cost. Just give us 7 days notice.
Yes. Personal coaching is included in our Elite plan, or available as a standalone add-on to any membership.

FinalCTA.heading: Your strongest routine starts here
FinalCTA.subtext: Start with one session, one plan, and one decision to move forward.

Auth.signInDesc: Sign in to manage your membership, bookings, and fitness progress.
Auth.signUpDesc: Create your account and take the first step toward a stronger routine.
Auth.privacyNote: Your information is only used for membership and training support.

quotes.signin: Consistency beats intensity when you show up every week.
quotes.signup: The best investment you can ever make is in your own health.
